ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-21-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-27-2024 Continued To Jan-21-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Nancy E. Lofdahl for Denise Darcel Smith, Petitioner.

Ms. Lofdahl apologized to the court and acknowledged not filing a status report. Ms. Lofdahl informed the court of ongoing efforts to address issues related to the current occupant of the property and their efforts to remove him. Counsel plans to coordinate with Ms. Callejo and the realtor in the coming weeks to determine the best course of action.

The court continued the status hearing to January 21, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to allow progress on resolving the issues and preparing the property for sale. Counsel was directed to file either a status report or petition for final distribution by January 14, 2025.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-16-2024 Continued To Nov-27-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Franchesca Callejo, Esq., for Macina Taylor, Successor Administrator.
Nancy Lofdahl, Esq., for Denise Smith, Administrator of related Estate.

The following related matters are called:
PES-18-301880; PES-20-304064; PES-21-304527; and PES-21-304896.

At the court's query, counsel offers an update on the subject matters and the status of settlement. Ms. Lofdahl reports that there is a delay in listing and selling the Estate's real property due to a pending Unlawful Detainer matter and provides the court with the case number (CUD-24-675768). The court instructs counsel to file a petition to approve status of the estate in this matter and each related matter. Upon agreement by counsel and the court, the above-referenced petitions are to be filed by Nov-13-2024.

The subject matter is continued to Nov-27-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Lopez. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Mediation
Off Calendar May-01-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-01-2024 Continued To Oct-16-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-07-2024 Continued To May-01-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Nancy Lofdahl, Esq., for Denise Smith, Administrator.

Counsel offers an update on the status of the estate and related real property. The court queries whether the matter might be fit for mediation. Counsel advises that mediation might be beneficial. The Court signed the order referring THE MATTER TO Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation MUST BE COMPLETED NO LATER THAN Apr-10-2024. The Parties ARE TO NOTIFY THE Probate Examiner AS TO THE OUTCOME OF MEDIATION BY Apr-17-2024. THE Parties ARE TO RETURN ON May-01-2024 AT 9:00 A.M., IN Dept. 204 FOR STATUS OF MEDIATION. Counsel is instructed to monitor the court's register of actions to obtain a copy of the mediation order and notify all parties who are entitled to notice, of the preceding.

The subject matter is continued to May-01-2024 AT 9:00 A.M., IN Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar May-03-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance; Nancy Lofdahl appearing via zoom for Denise Darcel Smith (Administrator).

Mrs. Lofdahl stated that the Civil matter does not look like it's near resolution, that the property is titled in the names of the four siblings who have all died, and that Essie Carroll's estate is the one holding this up. Further discussion was held regarding the lien against one of the owners, there being no plan to sell the property until the Civil matter is resolved, Essie's' estate being the only one that does not have a medi-cal lean, Mrs. Lofdahl being in touch with the health department with respect to the medi-cal lean on this estate, the other estates not qualifying for an exemption, Roland waving an accounting but the waiver not have been filed yet, the issue of having all four cases on the same path/hearing dates, etc. The Petition for approval of status report for administration of estate, etc. is under submission.

Judge; Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Ateesh Datt; Deputy: Cristobal; Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Feb-01-2023 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jan-04-2023 Continued To Feb-01-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom: Nancy Lofdahl, Esq. for Denise D. Smith (Administrator).

The Court reads the minutes of 9/22/22 to Ms. Lofdahl in open court. Ms. Lofdahl addresses the delay and states that it was her estimate that the matter would be ready with regard to this 25% interest, that another estate litigation was holding things up, that she erred and thought that they could do this, that there wasn't a medical lien, that there now is a medical lien, and that the property needs to be sold. Ms. Lofdahl extends an apology to the Court for the delay, states that a petition is ready to filed, and that she just needs to incorporate the health department information.

Today's status is continued to February 1, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: K. Saephon/H. Singh. Matter not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Sep-12-2022 Continued To Oct-31-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nancy Lofdahl, via Zoom, for Denise D. Smith, Administrator.

Ms. Lofdhal reports that she intends to file a petition for final distribution soon and requests a continuance accordingly. The court advises counsel that it intends to grant her request for a continuance, but the court is expecting the filing of either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration prior to the next hearing date or an appearance will be required.

The matter is continued to Oct-31-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.
